...Those blue eyes that look just like hers... Ah... It's been a year since we last
met, I'd almost forgotten... That's right... She had eyes like this too.........

Eyes as clear and beautiful as a summer blue sky... Even though only a year has
passed, they'd slipped so far from my memory. And yet... I never thought I'd remember
them in a place like this.........
